modules.title: AI Ethics and Data Privacy
modules.description: AI Ethics and Data Privacy

meta.course-unit-read:
Artificial Intelligence is transforming our world, bringing both opportunities and challenges.
Among the primary ethical dilemmas of AI are privacy infringements, potential job displacements, and enhanced surveillance.
As AI continues to evolve, ensuring that its development and deployment respect human rights and promote societal well-being becomes paramount.
Remember, the key to harnessing AI's potential lies in ethical use.

quiz.title: Understanding AI Ethics
quiz.description: Understanding AI Ethics

questions.text: Which of the following ethical concerns about AI have you personally experienced or are most concerned about?

meta.course-unit-read:
AI systems are often viewed as objective, but they're only as unbiased as the data they learn from.
Algorithmic bias, evident when a facial recognition system misidentifies certain ethnicities, can have harmful repercussions.
It's essential to use diverse training data, regularly test the AI system for fairness, and actively correct biases.
With vigilance and understanding, we can work towards equitable AI systems.

quiz.title: Addressing Bias in AI
quiz.description: Addressing Bias in AI

questions.text: Have you encountered a situation where you believed an AI system was biased? If so, in which context?

answers.text: I haven't encountered such a situation

meta.course-unit-read:
Data privacy is central in our digital age.
AI, especially when mishandled, can compromise data privacy by inadvertently revealing personal information or patterns.
A misconfigured AI system might, for instance, make personal data public or a predictive system might infer sensitive information.
Always be cautious about the permissions an AI application requests and prioritize systems with robust data protection policies.

quiz.title: AI and Data Privacy Basics
quiz.description: AI and Data Privacy Basics

questions.text: Which of the following best describes your stance on AI applications accessing your data?

answers.text: I'm comfortable as long as it improves user experience
I avoid any AI application that requests personal data
I only trust certain known brands or platforms
I'm unsure about how AI applications use my data

meta.course-unit-read:
In our data-driven world, confidentiality is key.
Ensuring data confidentiality in AI means safeguarding information, adhering to the principle of data minimization, and only using what's necessary.
Techniques such as data encryption and differential privacy protect users' information.
Remember, it's not just about collecting data but ensuring it remains confidential.

quiz.title: Ensuring Data Confidentiality
quiz.description: Ensuring Data Confidentiality

questions.text: How often do you utilize tools or practices to ensure the confidentiality of your data when interacting with AI systems?

answers.text: Never, I'm unaware of such tools or practices

meta.course-unit-read:
Imagine an AI system recommending medical treatments.
If the system is biased, a patient might get inappropriate advice.
Ensuring ethical decisions in AI requires transparent processes, accountability mechanisms, and robust audits.
Systems must be designed keeping ethical considerations at the forefront, regularly questioning AI decisions, especially in critical sectors.
Ethical AI is more than a goal; it's a necessity.

quiz.title: Ethical Decision Making in AI
quiz.description: Ethical Decision Making in AI

questions.text: In which industry or sector are you most concerned about AI making unethical decisions?

units.title: AI's Impact on Society and Responsible AI Practices

meta.course-unit-read:
From groundbreaking medical diagnostics to potential misuses like deepfakes, AI's societal impact is significant.
Responsible AI is the principle of developing systems that are fair, accountable, transparent, and beneficial.
This means continuously weighing AI's benefits against risks, staying updated, and advocating for ethical practices.
As AI evolves, our commitment to responsible practices will define our future.

quiz.title: AI's Impact on Society and Responsible AI Practices
quiz.description: AI's Impact on Society and Responsible AI Practices

questions.text: Which potential societal impact of AI are you most eager to see realized, and which concerns you the most?

answers.text: Eager: Medical advancements / Concerned: Misinformation spread
Eager: Transportation improvements / Concerned: Job loss due to automation
Eager: Enhanced education tools / Concerned: Data privacy breaches
Eager: Personalized entertainment / Concerned: Enhanced surveillance
